source_pr.title: store/mockstore/unistore: migrate unistore core lib code to tidb repo for removing tidb dependency on unistore
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary: tidb and unistore are interdependent.

### What is changed and how it works?

Migrate unistore core lib code to tidb repo for removing tidb dependency on unistore.

### Related changes

- Nah

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

- Nah

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No longer rely on unistore module.
